title: フェブラリーSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the February Stakes. Maybe
because it's the first race following Smart Falcon's
declaration, the atmosphere at the venue feels
unusually giddy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokyo Racecourse is the same venue where the
Japanese Derby, one of Japan's leading races, is
held.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At present, this race can't hold a candle to the
popularity of the Derby, but Smart Falcon takes
it on nonetheless, determined to win and get
more people talking.
